basic_details.job_title: District Court Chamba Clerks Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Court Chamba Clerks Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website of District Court Chamba under Advertisement No. DJ-E-(B-4)Vol-XII-34/87-. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the District Court Chamba Clerks Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Clerks (from Bailiffs): +2 with three years of service as Bailiff or combined service as Bailiff and Process-Server/Daftri. Clerks (from Class-IV employees): +2 with at least 5 years of service.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Chamba Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://district.ecourts.gov.in/chamba.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Court Chamba Clerks recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the District Court Chamba Clerks recruitment is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Clerks posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Clerks posts in the District Court Chamba recruitment 2026. These are divided into two categories based on the current service of the applicants.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Clerks posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Clerks posts is +2 (12th pass). Specific service experience is also required for different categories of Clerks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for District Court Chamba Clerks recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Clerks posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Clerks posts will include a Written Examination followed by a Typing Test. Candidates must qualify in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Court Chamba, which is https://district.ecourts.gov.in/chamba.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Clerks positions is Full Time, indicating a regular employment opportunity with the District Court Chamba.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Himachal Pradesh apply?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly state any domicile restrictions. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification to confirm any state-specific requirements.
